creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #21)
> The results of ipfw -D show indicated that more than 2 packets were captured due to the ipv6-icmp rule, this patch may be meaningful :)

When you create ICMPv6 state with specified src/dst, this won't help when ICMPv6 message will be generated by some intermediate router, because it's source address will not be the same, as used in created state.
